statement: In every magma, Equation 939 (`x = y * ((y * z) * (w * y))`) implies Equation 1238 (`x = x * (((y * x) * x) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0621
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y z) (op w y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op (op y x) x) x))
